criteria.text: Full unit test suite passes (pytest, all modules: a2ui validator/repair, compose, import, order state machine, notify fallback, vietqr CRC, qr batch).

End-to-end smoke runs WITHOUT any Gemini API key (mock mode): import fixture -> chuẩn menu -> compose valid A2UI -> cache -> place COD order -> state machine created->seller_seen->confirmed->done -> notify fallback fires -> group order split -> QR batch + VietQR payload + flyer PDF generated.
Core deliverable files exist: buyer renderer, seller PWA entry, menu schema, catalog.
criteria.check: test -f buyer/renderer.js && test -f seller/index.html && test -f shared/menu_schema.json && test -f agents/tiemquen_agent/catalogs/tiemquen_emenu_v1.json

criteria.text: Golden rule (ARCH §5.1): no LLM call anywhere on the buyer path — buyer/ static assets and the order-serving endpoints (view menu, place order, order status) must not import or invoke google-genai or any LLM. LLM only in compose/import/flyer/order-parse (compose-time).
README quickstart is accurate: a fresh dev can create venv, install, boot the server, open the demo shop buyer page and seller dashboard by following it verbatim.

foundation.summary: Foundation phase complete; committed as 9557b54 on wf/tiemquen-mvp. Python venv (uv-managed CPython 3.12.12, NOT plain python3 -m venv — Homebrew python3/python3.13 pyexpat broken on this machine), shared/menu_schema.json + menu_format.py (validate_menu incl referential integrity), shared/order_states.py, data/fixtures/demo_shop.json, infra/storage.py (Storage ABC + LocalJSONStorage), infra/publish.py (slugify + SlugRegistry, auto-suffix collisions), agents/tiemquen_agent/server.py (create_app, /health, shops CRUD, static mounts), scripts/e2e_smoke.py steps 1-4, 43 tests green, README quickstart.

engine.summary: Compose engine built, committed 7c01787. agents/tiemquen_agent/a2ui.py (A2UI v0.9 builders + parse_a2ui + validate_and_repair), catalogs/tiemquen_emenu_v1.json (13 SPEC components), compose/theme.py (derive_theme, WCAG>=4.5 forced), compose/composer.py (mock template mode + real gemini-flash-latest mode, 4 variants office|table x lunch|regular), compose/racing.py (race_compose), compose/cache.py (ComposeCache + patch_data), server endpoints /api/shops/{slug}/compose+patch+composed/{variant}, tests all green, e2e_smoke steps 5-7 added. Endpoints under /api/shops/... ; same-path patches replace not append; DishCard ids section-scoped; real Gemini path written but unexercised (no API key).

importAgent.summary: Import pipeline built, committed 5340ae3. agents/tiemquen_agent/toolable.py (function-calling harness, real google-genai loop + mock replay via one _dispatch), tools/menu_tools.py (MenuAssembler + apply_menu_edits, price sanity), agents/import_agent.py (import_menu(source): screenshot/URL/text classify; mock replays data/fixtures/grab_screenshot_toolcalls.json incl deliberate mis-OCR price to exercise sanity warning; import_from_fixture(name)), agents/html_parse.py (ShopeeFood embedded-JSON scrape, raises ImportFallbackToOCR on any failure), infra/media.py (rehost stub -> /media/..., NOT auto-invoked from /api/import), server: POST /api/import (multipart|{url|text|fixture}), GET/PATCH /api/shops/{slug}/menu (PATCH applies edits + full recompose). e2e steps 8-9. 159 tests pass, e2e mock passes. Notes: endpoints under /api/ prefix (deviation from bare paths in task); imported menus have no shop.theme yet — compose before theme set raises KeyError (open question; e2e fakes theme); notes in implementation-notes/ImportAgent.html.

buyerOrders.summary: Buyer page + orders + notify built, committed d6cefc5, zero-LLM buyer path. buyer/renderer.js + context_rules.js + order.js + index.html + styles.css + group.html (vanilla-JS A2UI walker, cart/checkout/polling, group-order UI, ~42KB). infra/orders.py (order store + transitions wrapping shared/order_states.py), infra/notify.py (Channel iface, FCMWebPushStub/ConsoleChannel/SMSStubChannel, NotifyPipeline created-chain + ack-timeout watcher), infra/group_orders.py (group orders, split by actual consumption, VietQR-placeholder iface), tools/order_tools.py + agents/order_parse_agent.py (Zalo text -> order draft, mock heuristic + real toolable). server routes: /orders*, /group-orders*, /orders/parse-text, GET /t/{slug}, GET /g/{gid}. e2e extended: COD lifecycle + 3-member group order. 212 tests pass, e2e mock passes, hand-verified against real uvicorn. Gotcha: Starlette TestClient awaits BackgroundTasks synchronously — tests/smoke MUST set short ACK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS or order-creating calls hang ~120s (documented in implementation-notes/BuyerOrders.html).

flyerSeller.summary:
Flyer generation + seller PWA built and committed (8afd27c on wf/tiemquen-mvp). All 253 pytest tests green; scripts/e2e_smoke.py passes with new steps 12-13.

Delivered (all paths under /Users/thiennd/Documents/tiemquen/.worktrees/tiemquen-mvp):
1. agents/tiemquen_agent/imagen.py — hero/flyer background per ENGINE-SPEC §6: REAL mode google-genai generate_content response_modalities=[TEXT,IMAGE] with per-format aspect ratio (3:4 portrait for A5/A4, 1:1 sticker), flash-lite sanitize pre-pass, hard constraints repeated at prompt END, palette JSON (4 seed hex, contrast-checked via derive_theme) in the same response, one retry on text-only; MOCK mode Pillow gradient+noise placeholder (offline). PNGs cached to data/media/<slug>/hero_<fmt>.png with palette sidecar + cleanup_expired() TTL helper (hero_* files only).
2. infra/qr_batch.py — BatchStore (create/get/list/delete, batch_id embeds slugified location_tag + format so buyer context_rules classifies office batches off ?b= alone), qr_url() -> /t/{slug}?b={batch_id}, orders_per_batch(storage, slug, since) analytics (orders/revenue/last_order_at per batch, 'direct' bucket).
3. infra/vietqr.py — EMVCo TLV NAPAS payload (GUID A000000727, BIN+account nesting, QRIBFTTA, 704/VN, dynamic amount, ASCII-folded 62-08 note), CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE pinned to the standard 0x29B1 reference vector, validate_crc, parse_tlv, qr_png, deep_link (dl.vietqr.io), copy_text ('copy số TK + số tiền'), group_split_payloads for group-order refunds. BANK_BINS covers ~12 banks; raw 6-digit BIN passes through.
4. infra/pdf_export.py — print-ready A5/A4/sticker flyers (reportlab, mm sizes): full-bleed hero, name+tagline panel, 3 best-sellers with prices (skips hidden/sold-out, prefers platform_price dishes), big 'THÈM? QUÉT.' CTA, batch QR bottom-right in the safe zone on a white card; Vietnamese-capable TTF auto-registration (Arial Unicode/DejaVu candidates, Helvetica fallback). export_flyers(shop_doc, {fmt: batch_id}) -> data/media/<slug>/flyer_<fmt>.pdf.
5. seller/ PWA (vanilla JS, no build): index.html + app.js with 3 tabs — Onboard wizard (URL/screenshot/fixture import -> editable review table with price inputs, hide toggles, add direct-only dish -> 3 interview questions -> publish = POST /api/shops -> POST /hero -> PATCH /menu edits -> POST /compose), Đơn (5s poll of order list, 'Đã thấy đơn' ACK, status-advance buttons, đơn-theo-batch table), Tờ rơi (format picker -> generate -> PDF download links + batch history). manifest.json + icon.svg + shell-caching sw.js (installs standalone; API never cached).
6. Server (agents/tiemquen_agent/server.py): batches CRUD + /batch-analytics + /hero + /flyers (imagen palette seeds shop.theme when missing — hero MUST precede first compose for imported shops) + GET /api/shops/{slug}/orders (added for the Đơn tab); create_app gained injectable media_dir; seller/ was already mounted at /seller.
7. Tests: tests/test_vietqr.py (CRC vector + field order + tamper), test_qr_batch.py (analytics counting, since filter), test_imagen.py (mock PNG per format, cache/TTL, prompt tail), test_pdf_export.py (PDFs >10KB, MediaBox mm check), test_flyer_server.py (HTTP layer + PWA shell). e2e_smoke.py steps 12-13: A5+A4 batches -> mock imagen -> flyer PDFs >10KB downloadable via /media -> group-split VietQR payloads CRC-validate.

Design decisions + open questions recorded in implementation-notes/FlyerSeller.html — notably: reference-vector choice (CRC check value instead of a memorized full payload; reviewer should scan one QR with a real bank app before pilot), publish ordering constraint (hero before compose), mock-hero noise for realistic PDF sizes (~2.5MB), and the open product question of whose bank account receives group-split refunds (payer's personal account is never collected today).

verify.summary:
Full verification sweep of the Tiệm Quen MVP completed in /Users/thiennd/Documents/tiemquen/.worktrees/tiemquen-mvp (branch wf/tiemquen-mvp); everything green, committed as e42217a.

RESULTS:
1. Fresh install: .venv deleted/recreated, `pip install -r requirements.txt` clean. Host quirk: Homebrew CPython 3.13/3.14 has broken pyexpat (libexpat symbol mismatch with macOS 26.1) so ensurepip fails — used uv-managed standalone CPython 3.12.12; not a repo issue, README stays generic (python3, 3.12+).
2. pytest: 253 passed, 0 failed (1 harmless starlette deprecation warning).
3. e2e smoke without GEMINI_API_KEY: exit 0, all 13 steps PASS (fixture import → chuẩn menu → 4 A2UI variants → patch → COD lifecycle incl. 409 on illegal transition → notify FCM-stub/console/SMS fallback → group order uneven split → A5+A4 batches → flyer PDFs >10KB → VietQR CRC16 valid).
4. Real server on :8787: /health 200; POST /api/shops (empty body) seeds demo 201 (409 on re-seed); /t/com-tam-co-ba 200 referencing renderer.js; POST /orders round-trip 201 (server-priced 70.000đ, status poll works, unknown dish 422); /seller → /seller/ 200; flyer PDF downloads via /media (2.6MB valid PDF v1.4). Server killed after.
5. Golden-rule audit: buyer/ and all order-serving routes/infra have ZERO google-genai/LLM usage (grep hits are only comments). genai confined to compose-time modules (composer, imagen, toolable, import_agent). Judgment call flagged in notes: POST /orders/parse-text is the seller paste-Zalo path (allowed compose-time LLM), never called by buyer JS.
6. Buyer payload: page assets 33.5KB + one composed variant 15.2KB = 48.7KB (all 4 variants worst case 94.2KB) — well under 150KB target.
7. README.md quickstart rewritten to the exact verified commands (venv, install, uvicorn --port 8787, curl seed + compose, buyer/seller/health URLs, pytest, smoke) and re-run verbatim from empty data/ — all 200/201.
8. VERIFY.md written with runs/results/payload and known gaps: real Gemini/Imagen calls untested (no key), FCM/SMS are stubs, Firestore adapter doesn't exist (LocalJSONStorage only), no auth on seller endpoints.

FIXES MADE: .gitignore extended with data/shops|slugs|orders|batches/ (server runs previously dirtied git status). Decision notes appended to implementation-notes/Verify.html. Key files: VERIFY.md, README.md, .gitignore, implementation-notes/Verify.html. Tree clean, no stray uvicorn.

codeGate.summary: Reviewed the full wf/tiemquen-mvp diff vs main (~11.4k lines). Found 0 Critical and 4 High issues, all fixed and committed (8324b18): (1) compose/menu-edit endpoints 500'd with KeyError on theme-less shops (every imported shop) — now a clear 409 pointing at the hero step; (2) public order endpoints 500'd on malformed input (non-numeric qty, non-object items/customer, non-string dish_id/transition/member names) — now 422; (3) /api/import fixture name allowed ../ path traversal out of data/fixtures and leaked absolute paths in 404s — name locked to [A-Za-z0-9_-]+; (4) /patch persisted arbitrary values (a bad price string would later 500 buyer checkout) — prices now coerce_price-validated, soldout flags must be bool. Added 4 regression tests; 257 tests pass and the e2e smoke exits 0 in mock mode (repo has no lint config; pytest+smoke are the build). Medium/Low noted but not fixed: CORS wildcard and no seller auth (documented MVP gaps), media_dir ignores TIEMQUEN_DATA_DIR, innerHTML with server-controlled error strings, unwired local-path rehost in infra/media.py.

criteria.evidence: Ran `./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q` in /Users/thiennd/Documents/tiemquen/.worktrees/tiemquen-mvp: "257 passed, 1 warning in 10.05s", exit 0. Only warning is an upstream starlette/httpx deprecation notice, not a failure.

Ran `env -u GEMINI_API_KEY ./.venv/bin/python scripts/e2e_smoke.py` in the worktree: exit 0, final line "SMOKE OK — all steps passed." Output shows every required stage: compose cache for 4 variants (STEP 9), COD order created→notify chain fired ([fcm-stub]/[console]/SMS fallback lines)→ack→seller_seen→confirmed→delivering→done + 409 on illegal terminal transition (STEP 10), 3-member group order with exact uneven split (STEP 11), A5+A4 QR batches + mock imagen hero PNGs + print-ready flyer PDFs >10KB (STEP 12), VietQR EMVCo TLV payloads with valid CRC16-CCITT (STEP 13).
`test -f buyer/renderer.js && test -f seller/index.html && test -f shared/menu_schema.json && test -f agents/tiemquen_agent/catalogs/tiemquen_emenu_v1.json` in the worktree printed ALL EXIST, exit 0.

grep of buyer/ for genai|gemini|llm matches only comments asserting zero-LLM (buyer/renderer.js:6-7, buyer/order.js:2, buyer/context_rules.js:2-4); no code path calls any LLM. grep of infra/ and shared/ for genai|gemini|generativeai: zero hits. All google-genai imports are lazy, inside functions of compose-time modules only: agents/tiemquen_agent/imagen.py:105,144, agents/tiemquen_agent/toolable.py:196-197 ("lazy import: real mode only"), agents/tiemquen_agent/agents/import_agent.py:119, compose/composer.py:279. Order-serving routes in agents/tiemquen_agent/server.py — GET /api/shops/{slug}/composed/{variant} (line 387, reads cache only), POST /orders (438), GET /orders/{id} (470), /status (477), /ack (487), /transition (495), group-orders (527-584), GET /t/{slug} (738, serves static buyer/index.html), GET /g/{gid} (747) — invoke only OrderStore/GroupOrderStore/cache/notify, never composer/toolable/imagen. The only LLM-touching endpoints are /api/import, /compose, /hero, /flyers, and /orders/parse-text (order-parse), all explicitly permitted compose-side paths. E2e smoke passing with GEMINI_API_KEY unset corroborates.

Replayed README.md quickstart (lines 9-31) verbatim in a fresh git clone of wf/tiemquen-mvp under the scratchpad: venv + `pip install -r requirements.txt` succeeded (Python 3.12.12); `uvicorn agents.tiemquen_agent.server:app --port 8787` booted with no API key; `curl -X POST /api/shops` seeded the demo shop (shop_comtamcoba); `POST /api/shops/com-tam-co-ba/compose` returned 4 variants x 8 messages; buyer page http://127.0.0.1:8787/t/com-tam-co-ba returned 200 containing __TIEMQUEN__ bootstrap + renderer.js reference, seller dashboard /seller/ returned 200 with the PWA HTML, /health returned {"status":"ok"}, and the composed-variant fetch the buyer page performs returned 200; steps 5-6 in the fresh clone: 257 pytest passed and "SMOKE OK — all steps passed." Caveat (environment, not README): this machine's Homebrew python3.14 is broken (pyexpat dlopen: Symbol not found _XML_SetAllocTrackerActivationThreshold vs /usr/lib/libexpat.1.dylib), so a bare `python3 -m venv` fails locally; README already states "Python 3.12+" and the quickstart works verbatim with any healthy interpreter.
